agent.runner_summary: The simulator builds the existing OpenAI Agents SDK agent, keeps one SQLiteSession for the whole run, and executes each turn through Runner.run_sync(...) from a worker thread.

log_notes: User turns appear as user_message events and assistant replies appear as agent_message events.
This project exposes only the top-level agent plus a hosted WebSearchTool, so transcripts may not include locally replayable component boundaries.
Observed RELAI mock calls stay empty unless future local tools or subagent boundaries are added.
learning_env_guidance: Use agent targets for nearly all scenarios because this single-agent project does not expose local function tools or subagent component boundaries.
Use FixedInput when a specific missing-intake question, ranking behavior, or final summary wording triggers the regression.
Use PersonaInput when user persistence, ambiguity, or changing requirements affect how the apartment search conversation should unfold.
Use LLMJudgeEvaluator for listing quality, requirement coverage, and concise decision-useful summaries; use CodeEvaluator only for deterministic transcript checks.
Mocking cannot suppress the hosted WebSearchTool, so tests should prefer prompts that stay in intake mode unless live web search is intentional.
